chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. 1st Appeal No. 31 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 07.11.2025. Mr. Faiz Muhammad Chandio, Advocate for appellant. Mr. Mian Taj Muhammad Keerio, Advocate for respondent. = Counsel for the respondent has placed on record certain documents and supplied copy of the same to counsel for the appellant. For reasons to be recorded, this 1st Appeal is dismissed. JUDGE Tufail
